next_handler.name: Finnn AI
next_handler.context: Stable cut v0.8.3. Fifth stable in one day — same-day hot-fix on top of v0.8.2. Closes out Finnn's three follow-up patches (Parts E/F/G): receipts cron pushed to 15-min biz-hours sweep, AR collections kill-switch with three-mode gate (send/draft/disabled) and post-approval hook architecture, plus three v0.8.1-upgrade bug fixes (openpyxl/croniter declared deps, GL classifier test isolation, AMEX DECLINED filter tightening). Push to GitHub at tag v0.8.3.

focus_area: Finnn 2026-05-01 follow-up patches E/F/G — receipts cadence + AR collections gate + upgrade-bug fixes

tests.total_target: ~1525 (1293 baseline + ~170 Wave 1-3 + ~30 Patch ABC + ~30 Patch EFG)
tests.note: Run locally to verify; sandbox can't reach venv.

open_tasks.summary: Workday Supplier Invoice EIB exporter — gated on GL → Spend Category map from Workday config (col 113 of Submit_Supplier_Invoice_v39.1).
open_tasks.blocker: Need the GL → Spend Category mapping table from Workday.

open_tasks.summary: Wire project_router._geotab_tiebreaker when GEOTAB_* credentials land in config.json.
Quote management module + e-signature wire-up. Operator deciding between PandaDoc (custom MCP, ~$19/user/mo, has proposal builder) and SignNow (in registry, ~$8/user/mo, e-sign only).
Slack integration — parity with chat_* surface. Joshua deferred until real need surfaces.

recent_changes_summary: v0.8.2 stable cut — Tier-0.5 receipt classifier bypass + system_check_cron + timing-aware crontab installer.
Patch E (cron cadence): replaced single 0 18 * * * receipts entry with */15 8-18 * * 1-5 (15-min biz-hours sweep) plus 0 18 * * 6,0 (weekends daily). Run make install-crontab to pick up.

Patch F (AR collections kill-switch — safety-critical): three-mode gate in ar_send (send/draft/disabled) with per-tier override. Default: every tier 'draft' except escalation_to_legal 'disabled' (per Joshua's question-3 answer). Post-approval hook registry in draft_queue advances collection_events on approval. workflow_set_collections_mode lets operators flip from chat. 14 tests.
Patch G1: openpyxl + croniter promoted to declared dependencies in pyproject.toml. Were soft-deps, caused 17/19 v0.8.x test failures on clean upgrade.
Patch G2: gl_classifier test isolation — fixture now redirects gl_memo_classifier._INDEX_PATH to tmp + resets in-process _INDEX cache.
Patch G3: workday_journal_eib AMEX DECLINED filter tightened — DECLINED/REVERSED rows unconditionally excluded from EIB output regardless of include_pending.
Total since v0.8.2: 1 commit (E+F+G bundled), ~30 new tests, ~600 LOC.
pick_up_here: Wave 4 (quote management with e-signatures) is the next strategic item. Operator deciding between PandaDoc (custom MCP) and SignNow (in registry). Once that decision lands, the deterministic quote-generation module ships in ~1 day and the signature integration is another ~1 day.
instructions_for_next_handler: Read coassisted-workspace-ap-roadmap-2026-04-30.md on operator's Desktop for the AP/AR vision.
Read patch-efg-collections-and-cron-2026-05-01.md on operator's Desktop for the Finnn E/F/G patch context.
Bump VERSION in _version.py + pyproject.toml if you ship features.
Append a new entry to HANDOFF_LOG.md before handing off.
Run `make test-fast` and record pass/fail in your log entry.
Commit each spec / patch as a discrete git commit.
